Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • association - (Optional) Association details used only during create; updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • compartment_id - (Required) Updating this field after creation is not supported.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) A user-friendly display name for the DR protection group.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags for this resource.
  • log_location - (Required) (Updatable) Object storage log location configuration for the DR protection group.
    • namespace - (Required) (Updatable) Object storage namespace for DR protection group logs.
    • bucket - (Required) (Updatable) Object storage bucket for DR protection group logs.
  • members - (Optional) (Updatable) Full retained member list for the DR protection group. Updating this field replaces the retained set with the supplied polymorphic member entries.
